meta.hard_gate_order: Seven hard gates evaluated first. Verdict restricted to non-positive tier because not all gates pass.
meta.btc_benchmark_note: BTC is a weak proxy benchmark for HYPE. HYPE is a non-Binance altcoin with different market microstructure. registered_benchmark_relative_reaction has limited interpretability.

attribution_assessment.notes: Development Set sample w1_001. Single on-chain data source. HYPE price data availability from Hyperliquid candleSnapshot for 2026-05-25 is uncertain. BTC benchmark is a weak proxy for HYPE. Pre-outcome registration was retrospective (not genuine pre-registration). Insufficient_inventory for interference coverage. Overall: cannot attribute HYPE price movement to Loracle position with available evidence.
attribution_assessment.btc_benchmark_weak_proxy_note: BTC is a weak proxy for HYPE. BTC and HYPE have fundamentally different market microstructure, liquidity profiles, and investor bases. registered_benchmark_relative_reaction for HYPE vs BTC has limited interpretability.
